category.name: BarCode Image
category.preferred_workflow: Use custom barcode generator by default for non-DOCX outputs and for DOCX tasks with advanced/rendered/generator indications. Use plain barcode fields only for simple Word-field-only DOCX scenarios.

absolute_ambiguity_bans: Never use unqualified BarcodeParameters anywhere in this category. Always write Aspose.Words.Fields.BarcodeParameters.
Never use unqualified Font anywhere in this category. Always write Aspose.Drawing.Font.
Never use unqualified Color anywhere in this category for drawing or barcode color conversion logic. Always write Aspose.Drawing.Color.
Never use System.Drawing.Font, System.Drawing.Color, System.Drawing.Bitmap, or other System.Drawing types in this category.
If an API name can be ambiguous, use the fully qualified type name instead of adding a broad using directive.
strict_barcode_field_usage_rules: Do NOT use builder.InsertField with DISPLAYBARCODE string syntax.
Do NOT use string-based DISPLAYBARCODE fields.
Always create barcode fields using FieldDisplayBarcode object only.
Always set properties explicitly: BarcodeType, BarcodeValue, colors, scaling etc.
Always call doc.UpdateFields() after setting properties.
custom_barcode_generator_enforcement_rul: If output format is PDF, image, or rendered output, ALWAYS use CustomBarcodeGenerator.
If barcode type is not natively supported by MS Word fields, ALWAYS use CustomBarcodeGenerator.
If task involves validation, extraction, or rendering, ALWAYS use CustomBarcodeGenerator.
Never rely on DISPLAYBARCODE field rendering for PDF output.
typed_construction_rules: When a typed barcode field is required, create it via DocumentBuilder.InsertField(FieldType.FieldDisplayBarcode, true) and cast to FieldDisplayBarcode.
Do not instantiate FieldDisplayBarcode directly with a constructor.
Do not append FieldDisplayBarcode directly as a Node.
typed_parameter_rules: When generator workflow is required, prefer typed FieldDisplayBarcode property assignment over raw DISPLAYBARCODE string switch syntax.
For generator-based verification or direct generator calls, create an Aspose.Words.Fields.BarcodeParameters instance explicitly and populate matching values.
Do not rely on raw field switch strings like \f, \b, or similar as the primary implementation pattern for generator-required scenarios.

common_failure_patterns.symptom: Compiler error: 'Font' is an ambiguous reference between Aspose.Drawing.Font and Aspose.Words.Font.
common_failure_patterns.fix: Always use Aspose.Drawing.Font explicitly in DrawErrorImage and any barcode-image drawing code.

common_failure_patterns.symptom: Compiler error: 'BarcodeParameters' is ambiguous between Aspose.Words.Fields and Aspose.BarCode.Generation.
common_failure_patterns.fix: Always use Aspose.Words.Fields.BarcodeParameters in IBarcodeGenerator signatures and in any verification object construction.

common_failure_patterns.symptom: Compiler error: FieldDisplayBarcode does not expose a BarcodeParameters property.
common_failure_patterns.fix: Set typed FieldDisplayBarcode properties directly. When a parameter object is needed, create a new Aspose.Words.Fields.BarcodeParameters instance instead of reading a non-existent field property.

common_failure_patterns.symptom: Compiler/runtime errors around Aspose.Drawing.Drawing2D.FontStyle or invalid Aspose.Drawing.Font constructor arguments.
common_failure_patterns.fix: Use new Aspose.Drawing.Font("Microsoft Sans Serif", 8f, Aspose.Drawing.FontStyle.Regular) and avoid Aspose.Drawing.Drawing2D.FontStyle.

common_failure_patterns.symptom: Compiler error: EncodeTypes does not contain a definition for Code39Standard.
common_failure_patterns.fix: Use only valid Aspose.BarCode.Generation.EncodeTypes members and keep the Word-to-BarCode mapping method constrained to supported values.

common_failure_patterns.symptom: Runtime failures caused by missing Template.docx or missing input directories during sandbox verification.
common_failure_patterns.fix: Create temporary sample input assets inside the example before loading them, or guard file-system input scenarios with existence checks and bootstrap sample files/folders.

common_failure_patterns.symptom: 504 Gateway Time-out during generation, not a code-quality issue.
common_failure_patterns.fix: Treat as infrastructure noise. Re-run generation or allow the alternate engine result when the produced example is otherwise verified.

examples.task: Create a new Document, insert a DISPLAYBARCODE field, then save the document as DOCX.
Use DocumentBuilder to insert a DISPLAYBARCODE field with a DataMatrix barcode type switch.
Create a reusable method to insert a DISPLAYBARCODE field with customizable height, width, and type switches.
Create a macro to insert DISPLAYBARCODE fields with predefined switches for various barcode types.
Configure barcode height and width via field switches in the DISPLAYBARCODE field definition.
Customize barcode color and background via additional field switches and verify visual appearance in saved PDF.
Set barcode orientation to vertical via field switches and verify correct rendering in PDF output.
Apply different barcode types to separate DISPLAYBARCODE fields in the same document and verify correct rendering.
Replace placeholder text in a DISPLAYBARCODE field with dynamic values prior to barcode generation.
Use Document.Range.Replace to update the data string of an existing DISPLAYBARCODE field before rendering.
Implement error handling for missing barcode data in DISPLAYBARCODE fields to avoid document save failures.
Implement the IBarcodeGenerator interface to generate Code128 barcodes from field data.
Integrate the Aspose.BarCode library to enable QR code generation for DISPLAYBARCODE fields.
Configure the custom barcode generator to cache images for repeated field values, improving performance.
Configure the barcode generator to produce high‑resolution images suitable for large‑format PDF printing.
Generate barcode images on the fly during save by assigning the custom generator to Document.BarcodeGenerator.
Load an RTF document, assign a custom generator, and save the result as DOCX with barcodes.
Load an existing DOCX with DISPLAYBARCODE fields, assign a custom generator, and export to PDF.
Load a DOCX template, populate DISPLAYBARCODE fields with user data, and export the document as PDF.
Batch process a folder of DOC files, render barcodes, and save each document as PDF.
Process multiple DOCX files in parallel, each with its own barcode generator, and output PDFs concurrently.
Create a console application that accepts a directory path, processes supported files, and generates PDFs with barcodes.
Save a document with DISPLAYBARCODE fields as RTF, ensuring barcodes render as images in output.
Validate barcode images are correctly embedded in PDF by extracting them and comparing dimensions.
Validate that barcode images maintain correct aspect ratio after converting a document from DOC to PDF.
Test barcode rendering when saving a document to PDF/A format, ensuring archival compliance.
Add a logging mechanism to record each barcode generation event with field name and image size.
Create a unit test that loads a DOC file, renders barcodes, and asserts PDF output contains expected images.
Generate barcodes with variable widths based on input string length by programmatically adjusting field switch parameters.
Implement a feature to disable barcode rendering for specific fields during PDF export while retaining them in DOCX.
